63ba45a2b95c4811d9cd156668819e8e.full_text:
Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat

📅 04th – 08th June 2026
📍 Zorba The Buddha
📞 93119 58352

A transformative 4-day journey designed to help you:

✨ Release emotional heaviness
✨ Open & strengthen your authentic voice
✨ Melt stress stored in the body
✨ Experience deep inner stillness through sound
✨ Reconnect with confidence, creativity & joy

From sacred sound journeys to meditative chanting, breathwork, silence, music & expressive practices — this is not a retreat where you perform… It's a space where you finally stop pretending.

Because your voice was never meant to fit in. It was meant to resonate.

Come as you are. Leave lighter, softer, freer.

✨ Limited spots available
📩 DM to reserve your space

9d59fd726a62af5a2fce7e3b37538316.title: Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival
9d59fd726a62af5a2fce7e3b37538316.description: Ecstatic dance and meditation festival combining movement, music, silence, and inner celebration for emotional release and spiritual connection.
9d59fd726a62af5a2fce7e3b37538316.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨

🌙 What if dance could become your meditation…?

There comes a moment when the soul no longer wants to think…
it simply wants to FEEL, MOVE & CELEBRATE 🌿✨

💫 Step into a sacred space where:
🎶 Music becomes prayer
💃 Movement becomes freedom
🕊️ Silence becomes your inner home

At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, dance is not performance…
it is pure presence 🔥

When the body moves totally,
the mind slowly melts into stillness…
and meditation begins naturally 🌸

✨ Experience:
🌺 Ecstatic Dance & Celebration
🌙 Deep Meditation & Inner Silence

5d6bbafa29742ec40a38619e332017e5.title: Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival
5d6bbafa29742ec40a38619e332017e5.description: Residential festival combining ecstatic dance, music, and meditation to transform stress into inner awakening and meditative bliss.
5d6bbafa29742ec40a38619e332017e5.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨
🌙 Dance Your Way Into Silence…

There are moments when words are not enough…
when the heart longs to express, release & celebrate 🌿

Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival is an invitation to move beyond the mind and enter a deeper experience of awareness through dance, music & meditation 🎶🕊️

Here, dance is not about perfection…
It is about freedom.
It is about losing yourself so completely in movement that only presence remains ✨

💫 When the body moves totally,
the mind becomes silent…
and meditation begins naturally.

Inspired by the spirit of celebration, devotion & consciousness, this festival creates a sacred space where movement transforms into inner awakening 🔥

🌸 Through ecstatic dance, music, meditation & collective energy, you may experience:

✨ Release of stress & emotional heaviness
✨ Deep relaxation & inner calm
✨ Joy, playfulness & freedom of expression
✨ A stronger connection with yourself & others
✨ Silence, awareness & meditative bliss

Like Shiva Nataraj - the cosmic dancer -
every movement becomes sacred, every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

No matter your age or experience, you are welcome exactly as you are 🌙
You do not need to know dance…
your soul already understands the rhythm ❤️

🌿 Open for both Women & Men
🎶 Celebrate • Dance • Meditate • Transform ✨

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival

Leave lighter, freer & more connected to your inner self 🌸

5eb2cf079634557661b935b1bf810ea1.title: Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh
5eb2cf079634557661b935b1bf810ea1.description: Explore real nourishment through experiential practice. Create space to feel what fills you up.
5eb2cf079634557661b935b1bf810ea1.full_text:
Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh

What if nourishment was something you could practice, not just imagine?

3 Tips to Try Right Now:
💛 Pause for 30 seconds: Close your eyes and notice what actually feels good in your body right now.
💛 Feel warmth: Think of a person, a place or any moment that made you smile… remember as if it's happening now.
💛 Give: A kind word, a hug, or a smile to someone nearby.

Real nourishment isn't an idea. It's something you recognize when you feel it.

This is what we'll explore together in the Nourishment workshop with Jayesh. We'll create space to experience, in a very real way, what fills you up.

#Nourishment #SelfConnection #FeelMore #EmotionalWellbeing #AuthenticLiving

22919577e4ad9e735679825a91e673bc.title: Healing Sexual Trauma
22919577e4ad9e735679825a91e673bc.description: Workshop on healing sexual trauma through conscious sexuality work with awareness, safety, and honest communication.
22919577e4ad9e735679825a91e673bc.full_text:
Healing Sexual Trauma | 25 June - 1 July

Conscious Sexuality workshops at Humaniversity

Over the years, I have met thousands of people who carried a quiet question within themselves: "Why does something so natural feel so complicated?"

Sexuality is one of the most fundamental expressions of being human. It is present long before we understand it intellectually, and it continues to shape our sense of aliveness, confidence, and connection throughout life. And yet, for many people, sexuality is also one of the places where shame, confusion, and pain have settled most deeply.

Conscious Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

With love,
Sambodhi

679bd1b2dee9b7f79401927adc62b92d.title: OSHO BodyLove for Women
679bd1b2dee9b7f79401927adc62b92d.description: Live online course for women featuring meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry to reconnect with their bodies and cultivate self-acceptance.
679bd1b2dee9b7f79401927adc62b92d.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one the world taught you to perform 🌹

"Over time, we can feel cut off from our own bodies… from who we truly are." - Kimaya

As women, many of us learned to see ourselves through expectations, appearance, and outside opinions. Over time, it can become difficult to feel truly connected to the body — or at ease inside it 🌿

OSHO BodyLove for Women is a live online course created for women who long to feel more relaxed, accepting, and at home in themselves through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.

A space where self-criticism softens and a more natural connection with yourself begins to grow ✨

Schedule:
📅 June 6th & 7th, 2026
🆓 FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

To register or explore the course:
👉🏻 Write "BODYLOVE"

#meditation #osho #awareness #bodylove #embodiedawareness #womenandmeditation #selfacceptance #oshoonline

6b67cb76580e5b55b5ff34abaf94fa05.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
6b67cb76580e5b55b5ff34abaf94fa05.description: Live online course exploring relaxation through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to develop a relaxed relationship with yourself.
6b67cb76580e5b55b5ff34abaf94fa05.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonline

• Chakra Dance – Activate your energy centers.
• OSHO Gurdjieff Stop Dance – Sudden awareness bursts!
• Creative Movement Therapy – Heal through expression.
• Dance of Evolution – Journey through life's stages!
• Sufi Whirling Primal Dance – Spin into the divine.
• OSHO No-Dimensions – Beyond mind, pure freedom!
• Contact Improvisation – Connect body to body.
• 5Rhythms – Flow through stillness, chaos, lyrical!
• Gurdjieff Sacred Dances – Ancient patterns of awakening.
• Ecstatic Dance – Let go & surrender to joy!
• Dances of Universal Peace – Harmony in unity.

At Zorba the Buddha, Osho Mystical Village – a safe haven for joyful self-expression & inner exploration.

Sessions start at 7 PM: Mystical dance immersion.
Followed by organic buffet dinner in communal bliss!

No dance experience required – just presence & openness!
Beginners & experts welcome to this sacred circle.

Real Transformations:
"Reconnected with my inner child–pure magic!" – Sameera
"Stunning meditative dances. I live for Thursdays!" – Riya

Schedule: Every Thursday, 7 PM onwards
Contact: +91 93119 58352
Location: Zorba The Buddha, 7, Tropical Drive, Ghitorni, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd, New Delhi-110030

Join our 'Circle of Mystical Dances' WhatsApp group!
Build meaningful bonds with like-minded spiritual souls.

56d1e56dc3b509be09e5a7394dd4f7b7.title: Osho Zen Tarot Reader's Training
56d1e56dc3b509be09e5a7394dd4f7b7.description: Learn intuitive tarot reading through Osho wisdom, meditation, and consciousness exploration. Limited seats, prior registration required.
56d1e56dc3b509be09e5a7394dd4f7b7.full_text:
OSHO Zen Tarot Reader's Training

Step into a journey beyond prediction… into awareness, intuition & inner clarity.
At the serene space of Zorba the Buddha, immerse yourself in the transformative wisdom of the Osho Zen Tarot.

This is not about telling the future - it's about understanding the present moment deeply

Learn to read the cards as a mirror of consciousness,
decode emotions, patterns & energy blocks,
and guide yourself & others with insight, presence & compassion.

Whether you're a seeker, healer, or simply curious—
this training opens the door to meditation through awareness.

What you'll experience:
• Intuitive card reading techniques
• Deep connection with your inner voice
• Meditative processes & self-exploration
• Real-time practice & guidance

Let the cards become a doorway…
from mind to no-mind, from confusion to clarity.

Venue: Zorba the Buddha, New Delhi
Limited seats | Prior registration required

b29dd69dc062673706fd873abd1577e7.title: Meditation Camp at Kasar Devi
b29dd69dc062673706fd873abd1577e7.description: Meditation camp in the mountains at Kasar Devi, known for strong geomagnetic field supporting deep meditation practice.
b29dd69dc062673706fd873abd1577e7.full_text:
Our last retreat for May in Rishikesh was absolutely beautiful 🙏✨✨.

Thank you to all the wonderful participants who came and shared your energy with the group.

We took some of these sessions indoors when the temperature started to soar - to keep our focusing moving towards deep meditation.

So wonderful to meet you all. Life long connections definitely made.

In June we are taking our meditation camp up to Kasar Devi chasing the cooler climate. The mountains also being a special energy, and Kasar itself has an unusually strong geomagnetic field. This supports meditation with such ease.

If you'd like to join us in Kasar Devi, WhatsApp +919058967526.

And if you're wanting to join us in Rishikesh, follow @oshobliss_experiences to stay up to date with when we'll be back.

#osho #ओशो #rishikesh #ध्यानशिविर #activemeditation

ecd7d9970f4bfa0de18d234475c7df70.description: 20-hour online global meditation event with live meditations across time zones featuring guidance, community connection, and celebration of transformation.
ecd7d9970f4bfa0de18d234475c7df70.full_text:
Experience the meditations that have transformed millions of lives 🌍

One day.
Many meditations.
No experience needed 🌿

Global OSHO Meditation Day is a 20-hour online event with live meditations happening across time zones — creating a shared field of celebration, movement, silence, and connection.

MEDITATE with live introductions and guidance
MEET hundreds of friends from around the world
CELEBRATE transformation together ✨

Come for one meditation or stay immersed for the full journey.

🗓️ May 30th – 31st, 2026
20-hour event • Open globally • Join anytime

👉🏻 Learn more. Write "MEET" to receive the details in your DMs.

"This is what the active meditation is doing: bringing the suppressed up to be expressed; bringing your tears back to life, bringing your anger, your laughter, your sadness, back to life; throwing everything out of your system so that your system becomes purified, so that your system becomes innocent again." Osho, The Supreme Doctrine, 3

#meditation #osho #awareness #globalmeditationday #activemeditation #oshomeditation #consciousliving #innerwo

959e97a4600df7132e74555b8815d87d.title: Mystic Rose
959e97a4600df7132e74555b8815d87d.description: 21-day meditative therapy combining laughter, tears, and silence to dissolve emotional scars through total participation and awareness.
959e97a4600df7132e74555b8815d87d.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

📅 September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

6a9b9cb3f814ec4705dd72323fc14df0.title: Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh
6a9b9cb3f814ec4705dd72323fc14df0.description: Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. Weekend reset for sincere seekers experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness.
6a9b9cb3f814ec4705dd72323fc14df0.full_text:
Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh

Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. This retreat is a weekend reset for sincere seekers, experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness, or the weight of life's pressures; so they can reconnect to their own inner essence. A familiarity with Osho is a requirement - from reading his books, listening to his discourses or doing his meditation techniques and practices.

Includes:
• Kundalini and active dynamic meditations running through the day in the Buddha Hall and nature based spaces including the Ganga Ghats
• Range of accommodations to suit all budgets with room sharing options and private AC rooms. Starting price is ₹4300 for the 3 days, for dorm bed package.
• 3 satvik meals daily + some drinks included in cost.
• Meditations guided in Hindi and English.

Dates: 7 - 10th May
Venue: Dhyan Mandir, Lalkadi Ghat, Rishikesh
(Arrive 4pm first Day, Finish 2pm Last day)

For more info or bookings:
+919898346475
@thetempleofbliss
@oshobliss28

Meet your facilitators:
Dimpal
Christine
Sarju

1523220caae3269740d8ba36ffd94ccf.title: Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat
1523220caae3269740d8ba36ffd94ccf.description: 4-day immersive journey of emotional release, sacred sound healing, breath & voice activation, meditation & reconnecting with authentic self.
1523220caae3269740d8ba36ffd94ccf.full_text:
✨ What if healing isn't about "fixing" yourself…
but about returning to your natural frequency? 🎶

You carry more than thoughts inside you…
You carry unspoken emotions, suppressed energy & silent exhaustion. 🌙

And sometimes…
talking doesn't heal.
✨ Sound does.

Because sound moves where words cannot.
It travels through the body… softening stress, opening emotions & calming the nervous system. 🤍

A vibration can release heaviness.
A chant can awaken silence.
A voice can become medicine.

🌿 SOUND HEALING & VOICE OPENING RETREAT
📅 04th – 08th June 2026
📍 Zorba The Buddha
📞 93119 58352

🌌 A 4-day immersive journey of:

✨ Emotional Release
✨ Sacred Sound Healing
✨ Breath & Voice Activation
✨ Meditation & Inner Silence
✨ Reconnecting with your authentic self

🎵 This isn't a music class…
It's a remembrance.

Of the voice you silenced.
Of the peace you've been searching for.
Of the rhythm your soul already knows. 🌿

✨ Come as you are…
and leave lighter, open & alive.

📩 DM to reserve your space

c45f8a842afeeee6e13822fd1d12b199.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one you see 🌹

So much energy goes into looking at ourselves from the outside.

OSHO BodyLove for Women explores another possibility:
relating to the body through feeling, awareness, relaxation, movement, and presence 🌿

A live online course created for women who want a more loving and conscious connection with themselves — beyond image, performance, or self-judgment.

"A woman is more capable of going into meditation than a man is. The male energy is aggressive, violent, outgoing, extrovert, and the female energy is introvert, passive, ingoing….

…. It is easier to enter godliness through the body of a woman than through the body of a man."

Osho, The Dhammapada: The Way of the Buddha, Vol. 5, 2

f3d3d132921956fccae3e627413e9cc3.title: Osho Meditation Retreat
f3d3d132921956fccae3e627413e9cc3.description: Three-day meditation retreat at Osho Ashram. Multiple daily meditation sessions, meals, and comfortable accommodations included.
f3d3d132921956fccae3e627413e9cc3.full_text:
Next retreat 21-24 May 2026.

A review from our latest retreat 🤩

I have come to the Osho Ashram for a three-day retreat. One meditation session has just ended, and another is about to begin. This is our hall where the meditation takes place, and these are all the Swamis and seekers here between sessions.

The main reason I'm making this video is this: for anyone who has misconceptions about what happens at Osho—thinking it's like this or like that—let me clear it up for you.

It's only meditation. You get great sleep and good food. Everyone should come here. If you're already happy and doing well in life, it's not necessary, but I think you should experience everything life has to offer.

There are many Hindus here, people from Gujarat, and many Muslims as well...

To book the next one - WhatsApp +919058967526. (The only booking number).

#oshobliss #meditationcamp #osho #retreat rishikesh

18e48abce1678625dca444088b038148.description: Live online course exploring practical meditation methods to create space between you and your thoughts for presence and inner peace.
18e48abce1678625dca444088b038148.full_text:
Be here, not there 🌿

The mind is constantly pulling attention somewhere else:
later, earlier, elsewhere.

OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind is a live online course exploring simple and practical meditation methods that create space between you and your thoughts — so presence becomes something felt, not forced.

A playful exploration of four ways to find the mind's off switch ✨

🗓️ May 18th – May 22nd, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 13th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "QUIET" in the comments, and get the invitation to the course in your DMs!

"As you become skillful, as you learn the knack of not getting involved in the mind, as you learn the art of remaining aloof, away from the mind, as you learn the science of creating a distance between you and your own thoughts, more and more meditation will be showering on you" Osho, Philosophia Perennis, Series 2, 5

#meditation #osho #awareness #mindfulness #meditationpractice #presence #innerpeace #consciouslivin

b20d93fd41e72a5f13dd0a7886f84116.title: Osho Mystic Rose - 21 Days Deep Emotional Cleansing Therapy
b20d93fd41e72a5f13dd0a7886f84116.description: 21-day mediative therapy combining laughing, crying, and witnessing to cleanse deepest emotional layers and unconscious patterns through group process.
b20d93fd41e72a5f13dd0a7886f84116.full_text:
21 DAYS DEEP EMOTIONAL CLEANSING THERAPY

OSHO MYSTIC ROSE
20 June, evening - 11 July, lunch 2026

Facilitators: Ma Abha & Swami Jagdish

"I have invented many meditations, but perhaps this will be the most essential and fundamental one; this is absolutely my meditation." - Osho

Osho Mystic Rose Meditative Therapy is a very effective alchemy for cleansing the deepest emotional layers of the mind. These layers can easily be missed in ordinary meditation processes because the intellectual level continuously finds ways to protect them. However, in this therapy, since the practitioner gets the opportunity to freely express emotional extremes, the deepest doors of the unconscious can open directly. And because it is done in a group, this effect happens even more quickly!

This 21-day experiment is a wonderful opportunity for self-purification and transformation within.

Structure:
- First 7 days: 3 hours daily of Laughing
- Next 7 days: 3 hours daily of Crying (releasing sorrow)
- Final 7 days: 3 hours daily of Witnessing meditation

These practices bring the practitioner face-to-face with the subtlest layers of the mind. Additionally, other Osho meditation techniques work complementarily throughout this process.

Welcome to those friends who are ready for this experiment.

Venue: Osho Sanzen, Kotla, Solan, HP
Contact: 088943 51962

#osho #therapy #meditation #oshomysticrose #oshosanzen

3d0f50df20bfccb74567ec14ab390f8e.full_text:

5d21368e7cf76b0aee5016a5672a9c07.title: OSHO Mystic Rose
5d21368e7cf76b0aee5016a5672a9c07.description: 21-day meditative therapy: 7 days of laughter, 7 days of tears, 7 days of silence (3 hours daily). Open to Living-In participants and external attendees.
5d21368e7cf76b0aee5016a5672a9c07.full_text:
OSHO Mystic Rose

WHAT IS OSHO MYSTIC ROSE?
Laughter, Tears, and Silence.

For 21 days:
• Laugh for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
• Cry for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
• Sit silently for 3 hours a day, for 7 days

WHEN DOES IT START AND HOW CAN I PARTICIPATE?
OSHO Mystic Rose starts on the 11th of every month at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Whether you're in the Living-In program or joining from outside the Meditation Resort — the door is open.

More information: https://bit.ly/Join-OSHO-Mystic-Rose

Been through Mystic Rose before? Come back deeper, or simply to refresh. As a gesture of support, returning participants are invited again with a 50% contribution.

"The first thing to be done is laughter, because that sets the trend for the whole day. If you wake up laughing, you will soon begin to feel how absurd life is. Nothing is serious: even your disappointments are laughable, even your pain is laughable, even you are laughable." 
— Osho, Vedanta: Seven Steps to Samadhi, #1

bcab8a4d4626d2a4f8186d631b1f7995.full_text:
NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL
🌙 Dance Your Way Into Silence…

There are moments when words are not enough… when the heart longs to express, release & celebrate.

Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival is an invitation to move beyond the mind and enter a deeper experience of awareness through dance, music & meditation.

Here, dance is not about perfection… It is about freedom. It is about losing yourself so completely in movement that only presence remains.

💫 When the body moves totally, the mind becomes silent… and meditation begins naturally.

Inspired by the spirit of celebration, devotion & consciousness, this festival creates a sacred space where movement transforms into inner awakening.

🌸 Through ecstatic dance, music, meditation & collective energy, you may experience:
✨ Release of stress & emotional heaviness
✨ Deep relaxation & inner calm
✨ Joy, playfulness & freedom of expression
✨ A stronger connection with yourself & others
✨ Silence, awareness & meditative bliss

Like Shiva Nataraj - the cosmic dancer - every movement becomes sacred, every breath becomes alive.

No matter your age or experience, you are welcome exactly as you are.
You do not need to know dance… your soul already understands the rhythm.

🌿 Open for both Women & Men
🎶 Celebrate • Dance • Meditate • Transform

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival

📞 +91 93119 58352

Come as you are… Leave lighter, freer & more connected to your inner self.

At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, Dance becomes Meditation… and Celebration becomes a Path to the Divine.

0593b01713f0ea861b0628ec6b205f77.title: Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat
0593b01713f0ea861b0628ec6b205f77.description: 4-day transformative retreat for emotional release, voice opening, stress relief, and inner stillness through sound, chanting, breathwork and expressive practices.
0593b01713f0ea861b0628ec6b205f77.full_text:
What if the anxiety in your chest…
is actually a song that never got expressed? 🎶

What if your tiredness isn't from doing too much…
but from suppressing too much

For years, you've learned how to stay "composed."
Now it's time to learn how to feel. ✨

Not through talking more.
But through sound… breath… vibration… movement.

There is a certain kind of healing that happens
when your body hums freely,
when your voice stops hiding,
when your heart finally feels safe to open. 🤍

🌿 Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat
📅 04th – 08th June 2026
📍 Zorba The Buddha
📞 93119 58352

A transformative 4-day journey designed to help you:

✨ Release emotional heaviness
✨ Open & strengthen your authentic voice
✨ Melt stress stored in the body
✨ Experience deep inner stillness through sound
✨ Reconnect with confidence, creativity & joy

From sacred sound journeys to meditative chanting, breathwork, silence, music & expressive practices —
this is not a retreat where you perform…

It's a space where you finally stop pretending. 🌙

Because your voice was never meant to fit in.
It was meant to resonate.

Come as you are.
Leave lighter, softer, freer.

✨ Limited spots available
📩 DM to reserve your space

09e9b82e36b468fe0cce58909442d958.title: Osho Meditation Camp at Kasaar Devi
09e9b82e36b468fe0cce58909442d958.description: 3 nights, 4 days luxury Osho meditation camp featuring active meditations and live music by Swami Vatayana in Kasaar Devi's geomagnetic energy field.
09e9b82e36b468fe0cce58909442d958.full_text:
Kasaar Devi में ओशो मेडिटेशन कैंप

क्या आप 18 से 21 जून तक कसार देवी में होने वाले हमारे लग्ज़री ओशो मेडिटेशन कैंप (Osho meditation camp) में शामिल होने की सोच रहे हैं?

क्यों न आप हमारे साथ 3 रातें और 4 दिन बिताएं, जहाँ आपको कसार देवी के सबसे बेहतरीन अनुभवों का आनंद लेने का मौका मिलेगा। यहाँ हर दिन खास तौर पर चुनी गई कई 'एक्टिव मेडिटेशंस' (सक्रिय ध्यान) कराई जाएंगी, जिनमें से कुछ में स्वामी वातायन द्वारा लाइव म्यूज़िक भी दिया जाएगा।

@oshobliss_experiences को फॉलो करें और कसार देवी के इस अद्भुत जियोमैग्नेटिक एनर्जी फील्ड (भू-चुंबकीय ऊर्जा क्षेत्र) में आकार ले रहे इस खूबसूरत अनुभव से जुड़े रहें।

हमें वहां आपका स्वागत करते हुए बेहद खुशी होगी।

अधिक जानकारी के लिए व्हाट्सएप (WhatsApp) करें: +919058967526

#ओशो #ध्यानशिविर #kasardevi #luxuryretreat #himalayas

1a98da5b67f3ebd8c1bc9cd7c8845959.title: Meditation Camp at Kasar Devi
1a98da5b67f3ebd8c1bc9cd7c8845959.description: Meditation camp in the mountains of Kasar Devi, known for strong geomagnetic field supporting deep meditation practice.
1a98da5b67f3ebd8c1bc9cd7c8845959.full_text:
Our last retreat for May in Rishikesh was absolutely beautiful 🙏✨✨.

Thank you to all the wonderful participants who came and shared your energy with the group.

We took some of these sessions indoors when the temperature started to soar - to keep our focusing moving towards deep meditation.

So wonderful to meet you all. Life long connections definitely made.

In June we are taking our meditation camp up to Kasar Devi chasing the cooler climate. The mountains also being a special energy, and Kasar itself has an unusually strong geomagnetic field. This supports meditation with such ease.

If you'd like to join us in Kasar Devi, WhatsApp +919058967526.

And if you're wanting to join us in Rishikesh, follow @oshobliss_experiences to stay up to date with when we'll be back.

#osho #ओशो #rishikesh #ध्यानशिविर #activemeditation

07a2338cf0c1b551bff870f435d0b7e8.title: Mystic Rose - 21 Day Meditative Therapy
07a2338cf0c1b551bff870f435d0b7e8.description: 21-day meditative therapy combining laughter, tears, and silence. Week 1: Laughter, Week 2: Tears, Week 3: Silence. 3 hours daily. Free preview June 24th, 2026.
07a2338cf0c1b551bff870f435d0b7e8.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

#meditation #osho #awareness #mysticrose #meditativetherapy #laughter #silence #oshoo

This live online course supports a deeper understanding of what your body may be communicating — and how to respond with greater sensitivity and trust.

🗓️ June 16th – 22nd, 2026 
LIVE Online Course • 7 days • 1 hour a day 
FREE PREVIEW: June 9th, 2026

👉🏻 Write BODY in the comments and receive the details via DM

"The body will never misguide you, you can trust it, and you can trust it absolutely."
Osho, The Rebellious Spirit, 22

e9531d174a12161fe90dde1d7143b484.title: Osho Zen Tarot Reader's Training
e9531d174a12161fe90dde1d7143b484.description: Learn intuitive Osho Zen Tarot reading as a path to awareness and consciousness. Includes meditative processes, card interpretation techniques, and inner exploration for seekers and healers.
e9531d174a12161fe90dde1d7143b484.full_text:
OSHO Zen Tarot Reader's Training

Step into a journey beyond prediction… into awareness, intuition & inner clarity.
At the serene space of Zorba the Buddha, immerse yourself in the transformative wisdom of the Osho Zen Tarot.

This is not about telling the future - it's about understanding the present moment deeply

Learn to read the cards as a mirror of consciousness, decode emotions, patterns & energy blocks, and guide yourself & others with insight, presence & compassion.

Whether you're a seeker, healer, or simply curious—this training opens the door to meditation through awareness.

What you'll experience:
• Intuitive card reading techniques
• Deep connection with your inner voice
• Meditative processes & self-exploration
• Real-time practice & guidance

Let the cards become a doorway… from mind to no-mind, from confusion to clarity.

Venue: Zorba the Buddha, New Delhi
Limited seats | Prior registration required

32a57dde5a63be13ddd9fd2dd4845ae5.description: Biographical post about Osho's life and teachings, not announcing an upcoming event.
32a57dde5a63be13ddd9fd2dd4845ae5.full_text:
In 1964, June Munnaam Thiyathi Sayampam Mutthal, Rajasthaniley Neksppurril Vech, Osho (As Acharya Rajneesh Ennaan Aniyapettirunnath) Oru Alply Dina Vyapana Kyampi Nadathi.

Ith Osho Yude Mahattipurnnamaiya Oru Kyapnam Ayirunnu, Karanam Iya Kyapilaan, Arupyayi Osho Yude (Prabodhangalum Vyapangalum (Priniiyil) Redkorl Cheyppettat. Ath Pinit Piniyil 'Sayadpa-Paath' Enna Puskakamayum, Inglisil 'The Perfect Way' Enna Pustakamayum (Prasilikarikkapettu).

Osho Meditation session on Zoom
(on the occasion of Buddha purnima)

Unlock your true essence every Thursday evening!

🎨 Creative Movement Therapy – Heal through expression.
🦋 Dance of Evolution – Journey through life's stages!
🌀 Sufi Whirling Primal Dance – Spin into the divine.
🌌 OSHO No-Dimensions – Beyond mind, pure freedom!
🤝 Contact Improvisation – Connect body to body.
🌊 5Rhythms – Flow through stillness, chaos, lyrical!
🙏 Gurdjieff Sacred Dances – Ancient patterns of awakening.
🎉 Ecstatic Dance – Let go & surrender to joy!
☮️ Dances of Universal Peace – Harmony in unity.

At Zorba the Buddha, Osho Mystical Village – a safe haven!
For joyful self-expression & inner exploration. 🏰🙌

Beginners & experts welcome to this sacred circle. 💖✨

e8b9356738df0d2c972372fea8f18370.description: Live online course for women to reconnect with their bodies through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.
e8b9356738df0d2c972372fea8f18370.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one the world taught you to perform 🌹

"Over time, we can feel cut off from our own bodies… from who we truly are." 
Kimaya

As women, many of us learned to see ourselves through expectations, appearance, and outside opinions. Over time, it can become difficult to feel truly connected to the body — or at ease inside it 🌿

OSHO BodyLove for Women is a live online course created for women who long to feel more relaxed, accepting, and at home in themselves through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.

A space where self-criticism softens and a more natural connection with yourself begins to grow ✨

🗓️ June 6th & 7th, 2026 
FREE PREVIEW: May 30th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "BODYLOVE" to explore the course.

ae5be87bb2b7dfb69a539eb49532b1e9.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
ae5be87bb2b7dfb69a539eb49532b1e9.description: Live online course exploring relaxation through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to develop a relaxed relationship with yourself.
ae5be87bb2b7dfb69a539eb49532b1e9.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonlin

2c2559f4a42c7ac1661dcccb12968604.title: Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat
2c2559f4a42c7ac1661dcccb12968604.description: 4-day immersive journey of emotional release, sacred sound healing, breath activation, meditation & reconnecting with authentic self.
2c2559f4a42c7ac1661dcccb12968604.full_text:
What if healing isn't about "fixing" yourself… but about returning to your natural frequency?

You carry more than thoughts inside you…
You carry unspoken emotions, suppressed energy & silent exhaustion.

And sometimes…
talking doesn't heal.
Sound does.

Because sound moves where words cannot.
It travels through the body… softening stress, opening emotions & calming the nervous system.

A vibration can release heaviness.
A chant can awaken silence.
A voice can become medicine.

Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat

04th – 08th June 2026
Zorba The Buddha
Phone: 93119 58352

A 4-day immersive journey of:

✨ Emotional Release
✨ Sacred Sound Healing
✨ Breath & Voice Activation
✨ Meditation & Inner Silence
✨ Reconnecting with your authentic self

This isn't a music class…
It's a remembrance.

Of the voice you silenced.
Of the peace you've been searching for.
Of the rhythm your soul already knows.

Come as you are…
and leave lighter, open & alive.

DM to reserve your space

097af9d5448bd96207466c2ac695ff52.title: Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh
097af9d5448bd96207466c2ac695ff52.description: Explore real nourishment by experiencing what fills you up. Create space to recognize and feel authentic nourishment through guided practice.
097af9d5448bd96207466c2ac695ff52.full_text:
Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh

What if nourishment was something you could practice, not just imagine?

3 Tips to Try Right Now:
💛 Pause for 30 seconds: Close your eyes and notice what actually feels good in your body right now.
💛 Feel warmth: Think of a person, a place or any moment that made you smile… remember as if it's happening now.
💛 Give: A kind word, a hug, or a smile to someone nearby.

Real nourishment isn't an idea. It's something you recognize when you feel it.

Try the steps above. Notice what shifts.
You might be surprised how much is already there.

This is what we'll explore together in the Nourishment workshop with Jayesh. We'll create space to experience, in a very real way, what fills you up.

#Nourishment #SelfConnection #FeelMore #EmotionalWellbeing #AuthenticLiving

67f2944b343b8c9582cb917e66682d28.title: Osho Meditation Retreat
67f2944b343b8c9582cb917e66682d28.description: Three-day meditation retreat at Osho Ashram. Includes meditation sessions, meals, and accommodation. Open to all seekers.
67f2944b343b8c9582cb917e66682d28.full_text:
Next retreat 21-24 May 2026.

A review from our latest retreat 🤩

I have come to the Osho Ashram for a three-day retreat. One meditation session has just ended, and another is about to begin. This is our hall where the meditation takes place, and these are all the Swamis and seekers here between sessions.

The main reason I'm making this video is this: for anyone who has misconceptions about what happens at Osho—thinking it's like this or like that—let me clear it up for you.

It's only meditation. You get great sleep and good food. Everyone should come here. If you're already happy and doing well in life, it's not necessary, but I think you should experience everything life has to offer.

There are many Hindus here, people from Gujarat, and many Muslims as well...

To book the next one - WhatsApp +919058967526. (The only booking number).

#oshobliss #meditationcamp #osho #retreat rishikesh

5021836448f80f152f25e9f6a040fb22.title: Healing Sexual Trauma
5021836448f80f152f25e9f6a040fb22.description: Conscious sexuality workshop addressing sexual trauma healing with awareness, safety, and honest communication.
5021836448f80f152f25e9f6a040fb22.full_text:
Healing Sexual Trauma | 25 June - 1 July

Conscious Sexuality workshops at Humaniversity

Over the years, I have met thousands of people who carried a quiet question within themselves: "Why does something so natural feel so complicated?"

Sexuality is one of the most fundamental expressions of being human. It is present long before we understand it intellectually, and it continues to shape our sense of aliveness, confidence, and connection throughout life. And yet, for many people, sexuality is also one of the places where shame, confusion, and pain have settled most deeply.

Conscious Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

With love,
Sambodhi

732f243dfb9b90e97c4419ac245c84ee.title: Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival
732f243dfb9b90e97c4419ac245c84ee.description: Sacred dance festival combining ecstatic movement, meditation, emotional release, and celebration. No dance experience needed.
732f243dfb9b90e97c4419ac245c84ee.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨

🌙 What if dance could become your meditation…?

There comes a moment when the soul no longer wants to think…
it simply wants to feel, move & celebrate 🌿✨

💫 Step into a sacred space where:
🎶 Music becomes prayer
💃 Movement becomes freedom
🕊️ Silence becomes your inner home

At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, dance is not performance…
it is pure presence 🔥

When the body moves totally,
the mind slowly melts into stillness…
and meditation begins naturally 🌸

✨ Experience:
🌺 Ecstatic Dance & Celebration
🌙 Deep Meditation & Inner Silence
🔥 Emotional Release & Healing
💫 Joy, Freedom & Self-Expression
🕉️ A Deeper Connection with Yourself & Others

Like Shiva Nataraj — the cosmic dancer —
every step becomes sacred… every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

❤️ No dance experience needed
🌿 Open for Women & Men
✨ Just bring your energy, your openness & your heart

🎶 Dance • Celebrate • Meditate • Transform

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival
📞 93119 58352 | 98108 06501

💫 Come as you are…
Leave lighter, freer & deeply connected to your inner self 🕊️✨

#NatarajSpiritualDanceFestival #DanceMeditation #EcstaticDance #SpiritualDance #MeditationInMotion

6981d963ec296f5ed62a6a68fb3edfc8.full_text:
Be here, not there 🌿

The mind is constantly pulling attention somewhere else: later, earlier, elsewhere.

OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind is a live online course exploring simple and practical meditation methods that create space between you and your thoughts — so presence becomes something felt, not forced.

A playful exploration of four ways to find the mind's off switch ✨

🗓️ May 18th – May 22nd, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 13th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "QUIET" in the comments, and get the invitation to the course in your DMs!

"As you become skillful, as you learn the knack of not getting involved in the mind, as you learn the art of remaining aloof, away from the mind, as you learn the science of creating a distance between you and your own thoughts, more and more meditation will be showering on you" Osho, Philosophia Perennis, Series 2, 5

#meditation #osho #awareness #mindfulness #meditationpractice #presence #innerpeace #consciousliving

f6309e4ee5f43175f14004417782379b.title: Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh
f6309e4ee5f43175f14004417782379b.description: Weekend active meditation retreat for stress relief and inner realignment. Kundalini, dynamic meditations, sattvic meals, Hindi/English guidance.
f6309e4ee5f43175f14004417782379b.full_text:
Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh

Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. This retreat is a weekend reset for sincere seekers, experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness, or the weight of life's pressures; so they can reconnect to their own inner essence. A familiarity with Osho is a requirement - from reading his books, listening to his discourses or doing his meditation techniques and practices.

Includes:
• Kundalini and active dynamic meditations running through the day in the Buddha Hall and nature based spaces including the Ganga Ghats
• Range of accommodations to suit all budgets with room sharing options and private AC rooms. Starting price is ₹4300 for the 3 days, for dorm bed package.
• 3 satvik meals daily + some drinks included in cost.
• Meditations guided in Hindi and English.

Dates: 7 - 10th May
Venue: Dhyan Mandir, Lalkadi Ghat, Rishikesh
*(Arrive 4pm first Day, Finish 2pm Last day)

For more info or bookings:
+919898346475
Instagram: @thetempleofbliss
Instagram: @oshobliss28

Meet your facilitators:
Dimpal
Christine
Sarju

9b1d3cc5007d5382bef87f0677fb39c3.title: Osho Transformation Meditation Camp
9b1d3cc5007d5382bef87f0677fb39c3.description: Three-day meditation camp with dynamic meditations, silence practices, emotional cleansing, discourses, and community celebration guided by Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.
9b1d3cc5007d5382bef87f0677fb39c3.full_text:
OSHO TRANSFORMATION MEDITATION CAMP
Osho Jeevan Rupantaran Dhyan Shivir

A Three-Day Journey of Meditation, Awareness & Inner Transformation

In the serene and deeply beautiful atmosphere of Osho Upaban, a rare and transformative meditation camp is being lovingly organized under the guidance, presence, and spiritual energy of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.

This is not simply a meditation program — it is an invitation to move inward, rediscover silence, awaken awareness, and celebrate life in its totality. Surrounded by nature, meditation, and a vibrant energy field of seekers, these three days can become a profound turning point in one's inner journey.

VENUE:
Osho Upaban
Dobilla–17, Pokhara

CAMP DATES:
June 12 – June 14, 2026
(Jestha 29, 30 & 31, 2083)

ARRIVAL & REGISTRATION:
June 11, 2026 (Jestha 28)
From 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM

CAMP INAUGURATION & OPENING MEDITATION SESSION:
Begins from 5:00 PM onwards

FACILITATOR & SPIRITUAL GUIDE:
Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun

BOOKING & INFORMATION:
+977 984-0600056

HIGHLIGHTS OF THE CAMP:
✨ Dynamic & Active Meditations
✨ Deep Silence & Inner Stillness
✨ Emotional Cleansing & Awareness
✨ Celebration, Dance & Joyfulness
✨ Powerful Meditative Energy Field
✨ Transformative Discourses & Guidance
✨ A Loving Community of Seekers

"Meditation is the journey from mind to no-mind, from noise to silence, from personality to presence." — Osho

If your heart longs for peace, clarity, love, and transformation… If you wish to experience meditation beyond words and concepts… Then this sacred gathering at Osho Upaban may become an unforgettable doorway toward a new consciousness.

Organized by: Swami Yoganand

389a192afe054be7948524c40ac5f5de.title: OSHO Mystic Rose Meditation
389a192afe054be7948524c40ac5f5de.description: 21-day meditation journey with three weeks of laughter, crying, and silence—3 hours daily each phase. Release past patterns and reconnect with authentic self.
389a192afe054be7948524c40ac5f5de.full_text:
OSHO Mystic Rose Meditation is a 21-day journey that releases what you've been carrying:

Week 1: Laugh for 3 hours daily
Week 2: Cry for 3 hours daily
Week 3: Sit in silence for 3 hours daily

No talking. No analysis. No therapy sessions.
Just pure expression that dissolves the scars of the past and reconnects you with who you really are.

OSHO Mystic Rose Meditation happens every month starting on the 11th.

Learn more: https://bit.ly/OSHO-MysticRose

"I have invented many meditations, but perhaps this will be the most essential and fundamental one." – Osho

a9935ee5e48cdfe96ec32f2bf4a85bf8.title: OSHO Mystic Rose
a9935ee5e48cdfe96ec32f2bf4a85bf8.description: 21-day meditative therapy: 7 days laughter, 7 days tears, 7 days silence. 3 hours daily practice. Open to Living-In program participants and external guests.
a9935ee5e48cdfe96ec32f2bf4a85bf8.full_text:
OSHO Mystic Rose

WHAT IS OSHO MYSTIC ROSE?
Laughter, Tears, and Silence.

For 21 days:
🌹 Laugh for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Cry for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Sit silently for 3 hours a day, for 7 days

WHEN DOES IT START AND HOW CAN I PARTICIPATE?
OSHO Mystic Rose starts on the 11th of every month at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Whether you're in the Living-In program or joining from outside the Meditation Resort — the door is open.

More information: https://bit.ly/Join-OSHO-Mystic-Rose

Been through Mystic Rose before? Come back deeper, or simply to refresh. As a gesture of support, returning participants are invited again with a 50% contribution.

"The first thing to be done is laughter, because that sets the trend for the whole day. If you wake up laughing, you will soon begin to feel how absurd life is. Nothing is serious: even your disappointments are laughable, even your pain is laughable, even you are laughable."
- Osho, Vedanta: Seven Steps to Samadhi, #1

9bfc776e4ee319c41da54e84bea2ec6b.title: Online Intensive Meditation
9bfc776e4ee319c41da54e84bea2ec6b.description: Recurring online meditation intensives for lodge members and applicants. Sundays 9:00-10:20 AM and Thursdays 7:00-8:20 PM via Facebook Messenger.
9bfc776e4ee319c41da54e84bea2ec6b.full_text:
Laguna-Rizal-Quezon Lodge members are cordially invited to participate in our Online Intensive Meditation, scheduled every Sunday of each month, from 9:00 AM to 10:20 AM, commencing on June 7, 2026. We also offer Online Intensive Meditations every Thursday of the month, from 7:00 PM to 8:20 PM, starting on June 11, 2025. Please refer to the poster for the exact dates.

The events will take place online via Facebook Messenger, allowing you to participate from the comfort of your own space. For members, please get in touch with (0917) 318 5905 for the link.

Arrive as soon as possible, dress appropriately, and bring a copy of your credential note, which should show your membership in the Order.

Non-members are welcome to apply for FREE MEMBERSHIP, an exclusive opportunity that provides online access to meditation techniques and authentic wisdom spanning years of progressive lessons. To learn more about the teachings of RKMR, please visit our website at rkmr.org, where you will find excellent and substantial lesson topics unique to each Degree of the Order, not found elsewhere. You can also follow the instructions on the website to download and fill out the membership forms to become a member. If you have any questions, please send us a message @ (0917) 318 5905.

We eagerly anticipate the presence of all Laguna-Rizal-Quezon Lodge members and interested applicants at these events. We want you to know that your participation is highly valued, and we look forward to sharing this experience with you.

We look forward to seeing you at the upcoming events!

For more updates on upcoming intensive meditation sessions, free seminar schedules, and inspirational content, we invite you to like and follow our Facebook page (@Rosicrucians.RKMR.Org) and follow us on Instagram (@rosicruciansrkmrorg).

0510b40d3a15fe6b5264277dc260b2fd.full_text:
Your body is telling you something, are you listening?

"The body will never misguide you, you can trust it, and you can trust it absolutely."
Osho, The Rebellious Spirit, 22 ✨

5989bec78b237aa44b160ac6981bf0dc.description: Meditation camp in Kasar Devi mountains featuring active meditation sessions. Special geomagnetic field supports deep meditation practice.
5989bec78b237aa44b160ac6981bf0dc.full_text:
Our last retreat for May in Rishikesh was absolutely beautiful 🙏✨✨.

Thank you to all the wonderful participants who came and shared your energy with the group.

We took some of these sessions indoors when the temperature started to soar - to keep our focusing moving towards deep meditation.

So wonderful to meet you all. Life long connections definitely made.

In June we are taking our meditation camp up to Kasar Devi chasing the cooler climate. The mountains also being a special energy, and Kasar itself has an unusually strong geomagnetic field. This supports meditation with such ease.

If you'd like to join us in Kasar Devi, WhatsApp +919058967526.

And if you're wanting to join us in Rishikesh, follow @oshobliss_experiences to stay up to date with when we'll be back.

#osho #ओशो #rishikesh #ध्यानशिविर #activemeditation

f1f6e47fec6bfa05591960edd6bd571f.title: Nourishment Workshop
f1f6e47fec6bfa05591960edd6bd571f.description: Explore real nourishment through experience. Create space to discover what fills you up and practice authentic self-connection.
f1f6e47fec6bfa05591960edd6bd571f.full_text:
Nourishment Workshop with Jayesh

What if nourishment was something you could practice, not just imagine?

3 tips to try right now:
💛 Pause for 30 seconds: Close your eyes and notice what actually feels good in your body right now.
💛 Feel warmth: Think of a person, a place or any moment that made you smile… remember as if it's happening now.
💛 Give: A kind word, a hug, or a smile to someone nearby.

Real nourishment isn't an idea. It's something you recognize when you feel it.

We'll create space to experience, in a very real way, what fills you up.

#Nourishment #SelfConnection #FeelMore #EmotionalWellbeing #AuthenticLiving

1cfcda738cbd2199a05a075c6c7bb78e.title: Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival
1cfcda738cbd2199a05a075c6c7bb78e.description: Residential spiritual dance festival combining ecstatic dance, music, and meditation for inner awakening, stress release, and celebration of consciousness.
1cfcda738cbd2199a05a075c6c7bb78e.full_text:
🔥🕉️ NATARAJ SPIRITUAL DANCE FESTIVAL 💃✨
🌙 Dance Your Way Into Silence…

There are moments when words are not enough…
when the heart longs to express, release & celebrate 🌿

Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival is an invitation to move beyond the mind and enter a deeper experience of awareness through dance, music & meditation 🎶🕊️

Here, dance is not about perfection…
It is about freedom.
It is about losing yourself so completely in movement that only presence remains ✨

💫 When the body moves totally,
the mind becomes silent…
and meditation begins naturally.

Inspired by the spirit of celebration, devotion & consciousness, this festival creates a sacred space where movement transforms into inner awakening 🔥

🌸 Through ecstatic dance, music, meditation & collective energy, you may experience:

✨ Release of stress & emotional heaviness
✨ Deep relaxation & inner calm
✨ Joy, playfulness & freedom of expression
✨ A stronger connection with yourself & others
✨ Silence, awareness & meditative bliss

Like Shiva Nataraj - the cosmic dancer -
every movement becomes sacred, every breath becomes alive 🌺💃

No matter your age or experience, you are welcome exactly as you are 🌙
You do not need to know dance…
your soul already understands the rhythm ❤️

🌿 Open for both Women & Men
🎶 Celebrate • Dance • Meditate • Transform ✨

📍 Zorba The Buddha
📅 28–31 May 2026 | Residential Festival

📞+91 93119 58352

💫 Come as you are…
Leave lighter, freer & more connected to your inner self 🌸

✨ At Nataraj Spiritual Dance Festival, Dance becomes Meditation… and Celebration becomes a Path to the Divine. 🕉️🔥

#NatarajSpiritualDanceFestival #DanceMeditation #SpiritualDance #MeditationInMotion #ZorbaTheBuddha

e1035bdcb060a26ec27415b458e7ce3b.title: Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat
e1035bdcb060a26ec27415b458e7ce3b.description: 4-day immersive retreat with emotional release, sacred sound healing, breath & voice activation, meditation, and reconnection with authentic self.
e1035bdcb060a26ec27415b458e7ce3b.full_text:
Sound Healing & Voice Opening Retreat

📅 04th – 08th June 2026
📍 Zorba The Buddha
📞 93119 58352

A 4-day immersive journey of:
✨ Emotional Release
✨ Sacred Sound Healing
✨ Breath & Voice Activation
✨ Meditation & Inner Silence
✨ Reconnecting with your authentic self

What if healing isn't about "fixing" yourself… but about returning to your natural frequency?

You carry more than thoughts inside you… You carry unspoken emotions, suppressed energy & silent exhaustion.

And sometimes… talking doesn't heal. Sound does.

Because sound moves where words cannot. It travels through the body… softening stress, opening emotions & calming the nervous system.

A vibration can release heaviness. A chant can awaken silence. A voice can become medicine.

This isn't a music class… It's a remembrance. Of the voice you silenced. Of the peace you've been searching for. Of the rhythm your soul already knows.

Come as you are… and leave lighter, open & alive.

📩 DM to reserve your space

232a091db6158f87a2c0b8ab76cab708.title: Circle of Mystical Dances
232a091db6158f87a2c0b8ab76cab708.venue: Zorba the Buddha, Osho Mystical Village
232a091db6158f87a2c0b8ab76cab708.description: Weekly free-form dance meditation circle rooted in Osho wisdom. 14 transformative conscious dances including Heart Dance, Chakra Dance, Ecstatic Dance, Sufi Whirling. Sessions start 7 PM with organic buffet dinner.
232a091db6158f87a2c0b8ab76cab708.full_text:
🌙✨ Circle of Mystical Dances ✨🌙

Unlock your true essence every Thursday evening!

Through free-form dance, celebration & deep meditation.

Rooted in Osho's timeless wisdom & yogic flow.
Movement becomes a doorway to silence, bliss & balance. 🕉️🌌

Explore 1 of 14 transformative conscious dances weekly:

❤️ Heart Dance – Open your heart's wild rhythm!
🔥 Elemental Dance – Channel earth, fire, water, air!
🌀 Chakra Dance – Activate your energy centers.
⏹️ OSHO Gurdjieff Stop Dance – Sudden awareness bursts!
🎨 Creative Movement Therapy – Heal through expression.
🦋 Dance of Evolution – Journey through life's stages!
🌀 Sufi Whirling Primal Dance – Spin into the divine.
🌌 OSHO No-Dimensions – Beyond mind, pure freedom!
🤝 Contact Improvisation – Connect body to body.
🌊 5Rhythms – Flow through stillness, chaos, lyrical!
🙏 Gurdjieff Sacred Dances – Ancient patterns of awakening.
🎉 Ecstatic Dance – Let go & surrender to joy!
☮️ Dances of Universal Peace – Harmony in unity.

6cb1f124e1bb23e4f363d5e64c3ba984.title: OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis
6cb1f124e1bb23e4f363d5e64c3ba984.description: Live online course exploring stress management through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness to develop a relaxed relationship with yourself.
6cb1f124e1bb23e4f363d5e64c3ba984.full_text:
Are you comfortable just being with yourself? 🌿

Many forms of stress come from the feeling that we always need to do something, solve something, improve something, or move somewhere else.

OSHO Stress Management with Self-Hypnosis explores relaxation from another angle: learning how to work gently with the unconscious so the body and mind can return to ease 🌹

Through self-hypnosis, meditation, and awareness, this live online course supports a more relaxed and natural relationship with yourself — one where rest becomes possible again.

🗓️ June 13th – 14th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 7th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "STRESS" in the comments.

"Relaxation comes to you when there is no urge for activity; the energy is at home, not moving anywhere. If a certain situation arises you will act, that's all, but you are not finding some excuse to act. You are at ease with yourself. Relaxation is to be at home."

Osho, Tantra: The Supreme Understanding, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #stressmanagement #selfhypnosis #relaxation #innerwork #oshoonline

e2dd5a0885fe3447194a5bad45dff01c.title: OSHO BodyLove for Women
e2dd5a0885fe3447194a5bad45dff01c.description: Live online course for women combining meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry to reconnect with their bodies and build self-acceptance.
e2dd5a0885fe3447194a5bad45dff01c.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one the world taught you to perform 🌹

"Over time, we can feel cut off from our own bodies… from who we truly are." 
Kimaya

As women, many of us learned to see ourselves through expectations, appearance, and outside opinions. Over time, it can become difficult to feel truly connected to the body — or at ease inside it 🌿

OSHO BodyLove for Women is a live online course created for women who long to feel more relaxed, accepting, and at home in themselves through meditation, body awareness, and self-inquiry.

A space where self-criticism softens and a more natural connection with yourself begins to grow ✨

Dates: June 6th & 7th, 2026
Free Preview: May 30th, 2026

Write "BODYLOVE" to explore the course.

#meditation #osho #awareness #bodylove #embodiedawareness #womenandmeditation #selfacceptance #oshoonline

430cd758b8c46c22a2e15399fc3c6ea0.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

#meditation #osho #awareness #mysticrose #meditativetherapy #laughter #silence #oshoo

Osho Meditation Retreat Rishikesh

Journey into active meditations for energetic realignment. This retreat is a weekend reset for sincere seekers, experiencing stress, overthinking, restlessness, or the weight of life's pressures; so they can reconnect to their own inner essence. A familiarity with Osho is a requirement - from reading his books, listening to his discourses or doing his meditation techniques and practices.

Includes:
• Kundalini and active dynamic meditations running through the day in the Buddha Hall and nature based spaces including the Ganga Ghats
• Range of accommodations to suit all budgets with room sharing options and private AC rooms. Starting price is ₹4300 for the 3 days, for dorm bed package.
• 3 satvik meals daily + some drinks included in cost.
• Meditations guided in Hindi and English.

Dates: 7 - 10th May
Venue: Dhyan Mandir, Lalkadi Ghat, Rishikesh
*(Arrive 4pm first Day, Finish 2pm Last day)

Facilitators: Dimpal, Christine, Sarju

aaca4f56a0d3c9979d643ec3814ebee2.title: Osho Meditation Retreat
aaca4f56a0d3c9979d643ec3814ebee2.description: Three-day meditation retreat at Osho Ashram featuring meditation sessions, accommodations, and meals for seekers.
aaca4f56a0d3c9979d643ec3814ebee2.full_text:
Next retreat 21-24 May 2026.

A review from our latest retreat 🤩

I have come to the Osho Ashram for a three-day retreat. One meditation session has just ended, and another is about to begin. This is our hall where the meditation takes place, and these are all the Swamis and seekers here between sessions.

The main reason I'm making this video is this: for anyone who has misconceptions about what happens at Osho—thinking it's like this or like that—let me clear it up for you.

It's only meditation. You get great sleep and good food. Everyone should come here. If you're already happy and doing well in life, it's not necessary, but I think you should experience everything life has to offer.

There are many Hindus here, people from Gujarat, and many Muslims as well...

To book the next one - WhatsApp +919058967526. (The only booking number).

#oshobliss #meditationcamp #osho #retreat rishikesh

1e842b0c37308ef89118f1f74a8d8cda.description: Live online course exploring practical meditation methods to create space between you and thoughts, finding the mind's off switch.
1e842b0c37308ef89118f1f74a8d8cda.full_text:
Be here, not there 🌿

The mind is constantly pulling attention somewhere else:
later, earlier, elsewhere.

OSHO Methods to Quieten the Mind is a live online course exploring simple and practical meditation methods that create space between you and your thoughts — so presence becomes something felt, not forced.

A playful exploration of four ways to find the mind's off switch ✨

🗓️ May 18th – May 22nd, 2026
FREE PREVIEW: May 13th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course by writing "QUIET" in the comments, and get the invitation to the course in your DMs!

"As you become skillful, as you learn the knack of not getting involved in the mind, as you learn the art of remaining aloof, away from the mind, as you learn the science of creating a distance between you and your own thoughts, more and more meditation will be showering on you" Osho, Philosophia Perennis, Series 2, 5

#meditation #osho #awareness #mindfulness #meditationpractice #presence #innerpeace #consciousliving

fe477c63db54372fe46f182ed869ae70.full_text:
Be the woman you feel, not the one you see 🌹

So much energy goes into looking at ourselves from the outside.

OSHO BodyLove for Women explores another possibility:

667bc49a9b75febf1c2e985cb8913f4c.title: Healing Sexual Trauma
667bc49a9b75febf1c2e985cb8913f4c.description: Workshop addressing sexual trauma through awareness, safety, and honest communication in a therapeutic space.
667bc49a9b75febf1c2e985cb8913f4c.full_text:
Healing Sexual Trauma | 25 June - 1 July

Conscius Sexuality workshops at Humaniversity

Over the years, I have met thousands of people who carried a quiet question within themselves: "Why does something so natural feel so complicated?"

Sexuality is one of the most fundamental expressions of being human. It is present long before we understand it intellectually, and it continues to shape our sense of aliveness, confidence, and connection throughout life. And yet, for many people, sexuality is also one of the places where shame, confusion, and pain have settled most deeply.

Conscius Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

With love,
Sambodhi

7f8ead5387e924e4e7ed137a1c53a57d.full_text:
OSHO TRANSFORMATION MEDITATION CAMP
Osho Jeevan Rupantaran Dhyan Shivir

A Three-Day Journey of Meditation, Awareness & Inner Transformation

In the serene and deeply beautiful atmosphere of Osho Upaban, a rare and transformative meditation camp is being lovingly organized under the guidance, presence, and spiritual energy of Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun.

This is not simply a meditation program — it is an invitation to move inward, rediscover silence, awaken awareness, and celebrate life in its totality. Surrounded by nature, meditation, and a vibrant energy field of seekers, these three days can become a profound turning point in one's inner journey.

VENUE:
Osho Upaban
Dobilla–17, Pokhara

CAMP DATES:
June 12 – June 14, 2026
(Jestha 29, 30 & 31, 2083)

ARRIVAL & REGISTRATION:
June 11, 2026 (Jestha 28)
From 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM

CAMP INAUGURATION & OPENING MEDITATION SESSION:
Begins from 5:00 PM onwards

FACILITATOR & SPIRITUAL GUIDE:
Bodhisattva Swami Anand Arun

BOOKING & INFORMATION:
+977 984-0600056

HIGHLIGHTS OF THE CAMP:
✨ Dynamic & Active Meditations
✨ Deep Silence & Inner Stillness
✨ Emotional Cleansing & Awareness
✨ Celebration, Dance & Joyfulness
✨ Powerful Meditative Energy Field
✨ Transformative Discourses & Guidance
✨ A Loving Community of Seekers

"Meditation is the journey from mind to no-mind, from noise to silence, from personality to presence." — Osho

If your heart longs for peace, clarity, love, and transformation… If you wish to experience meditation beyond words and concepts… Then this sacred gathering at Osho Upaban may become an unforgettable doorway toward a new consciousness.

Swami Yoganand

45e1cbc867d0d9dec659a500e3e94924.title: OSHO® Festival On The River - Return to Life
45e1cbc867d0d9dec659a500e3e94924.description: Multi-day celebration with nature immersion, freedom, energy flow. Features Supriya Ermione's Connected and Vulnerable event on June 20.
45e1cbc867d0d9dec659a500e3e94924.full_text:
OSHO® Festival On The River
~Return to Life~

June 18-21, 2026

Agriturismo Assia
Fucecchio (FI)

Event presentations continuing!

At the festival, there will be a succession of moments in celebration, in joy, feeling at home, immersed in nature, in open spaces without walls that enclose you, without barriers, letting energies and vibrations flow. A succession of emotions that we will carry inside and will give us smiles and hugs.

Saturday June 20 from 09:30 there will be a complete novelty for our festival! For the first time with us we will have Supriya Ermione and with great joy, we are happy to be able to celebrate and travel with her in her event.

Supriya's Event: Connected and Vulnerable

A continuous unveiling of oneself and compromising one's image. How do we let ourselves be seen? How do we let ourselves be contaminated? How do we find our center?

About Supriya:
Circus artist and tantrika, counselor, lover of life, Alma Mater Studiorum University of Bologna graduate. She spends her life traveling and in freedom to know what love is. Mother, lover and friend, she now teaches Tantra and conscious sexuality at the international ISTA school and the Temple Arts Academy based in Verona.

We look forward to spending together a small space of our journey, to celebrate together.

Saturday June 20 with open arms and heart to experience a new and intense adventure with the exciting OSHO® Festival On The River!

c9bb34b57fb85f50b0f4bc19869204f4.title: OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind™
c9bb34b57fb85f50b0f4bc19869204f4.description: Live online course exploring reconnection with body's natural intelligence and developing loving relationship with its signals.
c9bb34b57fb85f50b0f4bc19869204f4.full_text:
Your body is telling you something, are you listening?

"The body will never misguide you, you can trust it, and you can trust it absolutely." - Osho, The Rebellious Spirit, 22 ✨

OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind™ explores how to reconnect with the body's natural intelligence and develop a more loving relationship with its signals.

This live online course supports a deeper understanding of what your body may be communicating — and how to respond with greater sensitivity and trust.

Schedule:
📅 June 16th – 22nd, 2026
⏱️ LIVE Online Course • 7 days • 1 hour a day
🎁 FREE PREVIEW: June 9th, 2026

Explore the details and book the course: https://bit.ly/OSHO-TalkingBodyMind-June2026

7be205871bcfa1b40178646fb3f0ad91.title: OSHO Mystic Rose
7be205871bcfa1b40178646fb3f0ad91.description: 21-day meditative therapy retreat: 7 days of laughter, 7 days of tears, 7 days of silence (3 hours daily). For Living-In and external participants.
7be205871bcfa1b40178646fb3f0ad91.full_text:
Time to say goodbye after an intense and deeply moving OSHO Mystic Rose. Hearts overflowing — a group hug was the only natural ending.

WHAT IS OSHO MYSTIC ROSE?
Laughter, Tears, and Silence.

For 21 days:
🌹 Laugh for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Cry for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Sit silently for 3 hours a day, for 7 days

WHEN DOES IT START AND HOW CAN I PARTICIPATE?
OSHO Mystic Rose starts on the 11th of every month at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Whether you're in the Living-In program or joining from outside the Meditation Resort — the door is open.

👉 More information: https://bit.ly/Join-OSHO-Mystic-Rose

Been through Mystic Rose before? Come back deeper, or simply to refresh. As a gesture of support, returning participants are invited again with a 50% contribution.

"The first thing to be done is laughter, because that sets the trend for the whole day. If you wake up laughing, you will soon begin to feel how absurd life is. Nothing is serious: even your disappointments are laughable, even your pain is laughable, even you are laughable."
Osho, Vedanta: Seven Steps to Samadhi, #1

#OSHOMysticRose #MeditativeTherapy #LaughterAndTears #OshoInternationalMeditationResort #MeditationRetreat
